name: @patchworkos/sprint-review-prep
description: Pull completed Linear issues for the current sprint, summarize with AI, post digest to #engineering Slack channel.
author: patchworkos

LINEAR_TEAM_ID.description: Linear team ID to pull sprint issues from

LINEAR_CYCLE_ID.description: Linear cycle (sprint) ID. Omit to use the active cycle.

SLACK_CHANNEL.description: Slack channel to post the sprint summary (e.g. #engineering)

TEAM_NAME.description: Human-readable team name included in the summary header
